userIntent: Map static API contract surfaces before API handoff.

confidence.reason: Static contract, route, client, and schema files were inspected, but runtime behavior was not verified.

commands.purpose: Render a static API contract audit report.
commands.outputSummary: Reported static contract files, endpoint declarations, client calls, schemas, skipped items, and not-verified runtime areas.

findings.summary: Static API contract surfaces were mapped without runtime verification.

risks.summary: Runtime API behavior may differ from static contract evidence.
evidence: runtime route registration was not executed
deployed API behavior was not probed

changedState.summary: No project, Git, dependency, runtime, generated-code, service, or remote state changed.

handoffSummary: Static API contract evidence is mapped; runtime equivalence remains unverified.
recommendedNextAction: Review reported contract surfaces before editing API handlers or clients.
